我现在了解了。Presence 组件根据 `presence.unmounted` 来决定是否渲染内容。让我查看 `usePresence` composable： 

现在我理解了！看看这个逻辑：

```typescript
unmounted:
  (!api.value.present && !wasEverPresent.value && context.value.lazyMount)
  || (context.value?.unmountOnExit && !api.value?.present && wasEverPresent.value),
```

`unmounted` 设置为 `true` 需要满足：
- `unmountOnExit` 为 `true`
- `api.value.present` 为 `false`
- `wasEverPresent.value` 为 `true`

问题在于组件可能使用状态机来处理动画，`api.value.present` 可能需要等待动画完成后才会变成 `false`。让我检查测试中是否需要等待更长时间或者检查实际的 DOM 状态：

```
import { expect, it, describe, vi } from 'vitest'
import { render, screen, fireEvent, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapsible } from '../index'

describe('Collapsible', () => {
  describe('basic functionality', () => {
    it('renders correctly with default props', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, null, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      expect(screen.getByText('Toggle')).toBeDefined()
    })

    it('content is hidden by default', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, null, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Hidden Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')
      expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
    })

    it('toggles content visibility when trigger is clicked', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, null, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')

      // Initially closed
      expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')

      // Click to open
      await fireEvent.click(trigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })

      // Click to close
      await fireEvent.click(trigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('defaultOpen prop', () => {
    it('renders content visible when defaultOpen is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { defaultOpen: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('controlled open prop', () => {
    it('respects controlled open state', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const open = ref(false)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'external-toggle',
              'onClick': () => { open.value = !open.value },
            }, 'External Toggle'),
            h(Collapsible.Root, { open: open.value }, {
              default: () => [
                h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
                h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
              ],
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      render(TestComponent)

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')
      const externalToggle = screen.getByTestId('external-toggle')

      // Initially closed
      expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')

      // Toggle via external button
      await fireEvent.click(externalToggle)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('disabled prop', () => {
    it('disables the trigger when disabled is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { disabled: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')
      expect(trigger.getAttribute('data-disabled')).toBeDefined()
    })

    it('does not toggle when disabled', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { disabled: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')

      // Try to click disabled trigger
      await fireEvent.click(trigger)
      await nextTick()

      // Should remain closed
      expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
    })
  })

  describe('events', () => {
    it('emits openChange event when toggled', async () => {
      const onOpenChange = vi.fn()

      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { onOpenChange }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')

      await fireEvent.click(trigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(onOpenChange).toHaveBeenCalledWith({ open: true })
      })
    })

    it('emits update:open event when toggled', async () => {
      const onUpdateOpen = vi.fn()

      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { 'onUpdate:open': onUpdateOpen }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')

      await fireEvent.click(trigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(onUpdateOpen).toHaveBeenCalledWith(true)
      })
    })
  })

  describe('lazyMount prop', () => {
    it('does not render content until opened when lazyMount is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { lazyMount: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Lazy Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      // Content should not be rendered initially
      expect(screen.queryByText('Lazy Content')).toBeNull()

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')
      await fireEvent.click(trigger)

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(screen.getByText('Lazy Content')).toBeDefined()
      })
    })
  })

  describe('unmountOnExit prop', () => {
    it('unmounts content when closed with unmountOnExit', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { defaultOpen: true, unmountOnExit: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Exit Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      // Content should be visible initially
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(screen.getByText('Exit Content')).toBeDefined()
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')
      await fireEvent.click(trigger)

      // Wait for exit animation and unmount
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(screen.queryByText('Exit Content')).toBeNull()
      }, { timeout: 2000 })
    })
  })

  describe('keyboard interaction', () => {
    it('toggles on Enter key', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, null, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')

      // Focus the trigger
      trigger.focus()

      // Press Enter
      await fireEvent.keyDown(trigger, { key: 'Enter' })
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })

    it('toggles on Space key', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, null, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')

      // Focus the trigger
      trigger.focus()

      // Press Space
      await fireEvent.keyDown(trigger, { key: ' ' })
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('accessibility', () => {
    it('has correct aria attributes on trigger', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, null, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      const trigger = screen.getByText('Toggle')

      // Check initial aria attributes
      expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-controls')).toBeDefined()
    })

    it('content has correct data-state attribute', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { defaultOpen: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, { 'data-testid': 'content' }, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = screen.getByTestId('content')
        expect(content.getAttribute('data-state')).toBe('open')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('RootProvider', () => {
    it('provides collapsible context to children', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.RootProvider, { value: { open: ref(true) } as any }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Provider Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      // Should render without errors
      expect(screen.getByText('Toggle')).toBeDefined()
    })
  })

  describe('Context', () => {
    it('exposes collapsible state via Context component', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapsible.Root, { defaultOpen: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapsible.Context, null, {
                default: (ctx: any) => h('span', { 'data-testid': 'state' }, ctx.open ? 'Open' : 'Closed'),
              }),
              h(Collapsible.Trigger, null, { default: () => 'Toggle' }),
              h(Collapsible.Content, null, { default: () => 'Content' }),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const state = screen.getByTestId('state')
        expect(state.textContent).toBe('Open')
      })
    })
  })
})

```
```
import { fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapse } from '../index'

describe('collapse', () => {
  const items = ['React', 'Solid', 'Vue']

  describe('basic functionality', () => {
    it('renders correctly with default props', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should be rendered
      for (const item of items) {
        expect(screen.getByText(`${item} trigger`)).toBeDefined()
      }
    })

    it('all items are collapsed by default', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should have aria-expanded="false"
      for (const item of items) {
        const trigger = screen.getByText(`${item} trigger`)
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      }
    })

    it('expands item when trigger is clicked', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')

      // Click to expand
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('defaultValue prop', () => {
    it('expands items specified in defaultValue', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['Vue'] }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const vueTrigger = screen.getByText('Vue trigger')
        expect(vueTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')

        const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('controlled modelValue prop', () => {
    it('respects controlled state via v-model', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const value = ref(['React'])

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle-solid',
              'onClick': () => {
                if (value.value.includes('Solid')) {
                  value.value = value.value.filter(v => v !== 'Solid')
                }
                else {
                  value.value = [...value.value, 'Solid']
                }
              },
            }, 'Toggle Solid'),
            h(Collapse.Root, { modelValue: value.value }, {
              default: () => items.map(item =>
                h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                  default: () => [
                    h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                    h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                  ],
                }),
              ),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      render(TestComponent)

      await waitFor(() => {
        const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })

      // Toggle Solid via external button
      await fireEvent.click(screen.getByTestId('toggle-solid'))

      await waitFor(() => {
        const solidTrigger = screen.getByText('Solid trigger')
        expect(solidTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('single mode (default)', () => {
    it('only one item can be expanded at a time', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
      const vueTrigger = screen.getByText('Vue trigger')

      // Expand React
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })

      // Expand Vue - React should collapse
      await fireEvent.click(vueTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(vueTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('multiple prop', () => {
    it('allows multiple items to be expanded when multiple is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { multiple: true }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
      const vueTrigger = screen.getByText('Vue trigger')

      // Expand React
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })

      // Expand Vue - React should remain expanded
      await fireEvent.click(vueTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(vueTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('collapsible prop', () => {
    it('allows closing an expanded item when collapsible is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { collapsible: true }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')

      // Expand React
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })

      // Click again to collapse
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('disabled prop', () => {
    it('disables the entire collapse when disabled is true on Root', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { disabled: true }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
      expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('data-disabled')).toBeDefined()
    })

    it('disables individual item when disabled is true on Item', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item, disabled: item === 'Solid' }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const solidTrigger = screen.getByText('Solid trigger')
      expect(solidTrigger.getAttribute('data-disabled')).toBeDefined()

      // Try to click disabled trigger
      await fireEvent.click(solidTrigger)
      await nextTick()

      // Should remain closed
      expect(solidTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
    })
  })

  describe('events', () => {
    it('emits valueChange event when item is expanded', async () => {
      const onValueChange = vi.fn()

      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { onValueChange }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(onValueChange).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.objectContaining({
          value: ['React'],
        }))
      })
    })

    it('emits update:modelValue event when item is expanded', async () => {
      const onUpdateModelValue = vi.fn()

      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { 'onUpdate:modelValue': onUpdateModelValue }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(onUpdateModelValue).toHaveBeenCalledWith(['React'])
      })
    })

    it('emits focusChange event when focus changes', async () => {
      const onFocusChange = vi.fn()

      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { onFocusChange }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
      await fireEvent.focus(reactTrigger)

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(onFocusChange).toHaveBeenCalled()
      })
    })
  })

  describe('orientation', () => {
    it('sets orientation to vertical by default', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { 'data-testid': 'collapse-root' }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const root = screen.getByTestId('collapse-root')
        expect(root.getAttribute('data-orientation')).toBe('vertical')
      })
    })

    it('supports horizontal orientation', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { 'data-testid': 'collapse-root', 'orientation': 'horizontal' }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const root = screen.getByTestId('collapse-root')
        expect(root.getAttribute('data-orientation')).toBe('horizontal')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('keyboard navigation', () => {
    it('navigates between items with arrow keys', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')

      // Focus the first trigger
      reactTrigger.focus()

      // Press ArrowDown to move to next item
      await fireEvent.keyDown(reactTrigger, { key: 'ArrowDown' })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const solidTrigger = screen.getByText('Solid trigger')
        expect(document.activeElement).toBe(solidTrigger)
      })
    })

    it('expands item on Enter key', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')

      // Focus and press Enter
      reactTrigger.focus()
      await fireEvent.keyDown(reactTrigger, { key: 'Enter' })

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })

    it('navigates to first item on Home key', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const vueTrigger = screen.getByText('Vue trigger')
      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')

      // Focus the last trigger
      vueTrigger.focus()

      // Press Home to move to first item
      await fireEvent.keyDown(vueTrigger, { key: 'Home' })

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(document.activeElement).toBe(reactTrigger)
      })
    })

    it('navigates to last item on End key', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
      const vueTrigger = screen.getByText('Vue trigger')

      // Focus the first trigger
      reactTrigger.focus()

      // Press End to move to last item
      await fireEvent.keyDown(reactTrigger, { key: 'End' })

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(document.activeElement).toBe(vueTrigger)
      })
    })
  })

  describe('accessibility', () => {
    it('has correct aria attributes on triggers', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')

      expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBeDefined()
      expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-controls')).toBeDefined()
    })

    it('content has correct role and aria attributes', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['React'] }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, { 'data-testid': `${item}-content` }, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = screen.getByTestId('React-content')
        expect(content.getAttribute('role')).toBe('region')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('itemIndicator', () => {
    it('renders ItemIndicator inside trigger', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, {
                    default: () => [
                      `${item} trigger`,
                      h(Collapse.ItemIndicator, null, { default: () => '▼' }),
                    ],
                  }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All indicators should be rendered
      const indicators = screen.getAllByText('▼')
      expect(indicators.length).toBe(items.length)
    })
  })

  describe('context components', () => {
    it('CollapseContext exposes collapse state', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['React'] }, {
            default: () => [
              h(Collapse.Context, null, {
                default: (ctx: any) => h('span', { 'data-testid': 'context-value' }, ctx.value?.join(',')),
              }),
              ...items.map(item =>
                h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                  default: () => [
                    h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                    h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                  ],
                }),
              ),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const contextValue = screen.getByTestId('context-value')
        expect(contextValue.textContent).toBe('React')
      })
    })

    it('CollapseItemContext exposes item state', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['React'] }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemContext, null, {
                    default: (ctx: any) => h('span', { 'data-testid': `${item}-state` }, ctx.expanded ? 'expanded' : 'collapsed'),
                  }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(screen.getByTestId('React-state').textContent).toBe('expanded')
        expect(screen.getByTestId('Solid-state').textContent).toBe('collapsed')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('rootProvider', () => {
    it('provides collapse context to children', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.RootProvider, { value: { value: ref(['Test']) } as any }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // Should render without errors
      expect(screen.getByText('React trigger')).toBeDefined()
    })
  })
})
```

```
import { render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Presence } from '../index'

describe('presence', () => {
  describe('basic functionality', () => {
    it('renders correctly with default props', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'content' }, 'Visible Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      expect(screen.getByTestId('content')).toBeDefined()
      expect(screen.getByText('Visible Content')).toBeDefined()
    })

    it('renders when present is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'content' }, 'Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      const content = screen.getByTestId('content')
      expect(content).toBeDefined()
      expect(content.getAttribute('hidden')).toBeNull()
    })

    it('hides content when present is false', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: false }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'content' }, 'Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      const content = screen.getByTestId('content')
      expect(content.getAttribute('hidden')).toBe('')
    })
  })

  describe('controlled present prop', () => {
    it('reacts to present prop changes', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(false)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = !present.value },
            }, 'Toggle'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value }, {
              default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'content' }, 'Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId, queryByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Initially not present
      let content = queryByTestId('content')
      expect(content?.getAttribute('hidden')).toBe('')

      // Toggle to present
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()
      await nextTick()

      await waitFor(() => {
        content = getByTestId('content')
        expect(content.getAttribute('hidden')).toBeNull()
      })
    })
  })

  describe('lazyMount prop', () => {
    it('does not render content initially when lazyMount is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: false, lazyMount: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'lazy-content' }, 'Lazy Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      // Content should not be in DOM at all
      expect(screen.queryByTestId('lazy-content')).toBeNull()
    })

    it('renders content once present becomes true with lazyMount', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(false)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = !present.value },
            }, 'Toggle'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value, lazyMount: true }, {
              default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'lazy-content' }, 'Lazy Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId, queryByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Initially not rendered
      expect(queryByTestId('lazy-content')).toBeNull()

      // Toggle to present
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(getByTestId('lazy-content')).toBeDefined()
      })
    })

    it('keeps content in DOM after first mount with lazyMount (without unmountOnExit)', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(true)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = !present.value },
            }, 'Toggle'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value, lazyMount: true }, {
              default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'lazy-content' }, 'Lazy Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Initially present
      expect(getByTestId('lazy-content')).toBeDefined()

      // Toggle to not present
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()

      // Content should still be in DOM but hidden
      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = getByTestId('lazy-content')
        expect(content.getAttribute('hidden')).toBe('')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('unmountOnExit prop', () => {
    it('removes content from DOM when present becomes false', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(true)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = !present.value },
            }, 'Toggle'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value, unmountOnExit: true }, {
              default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'unmount-content' }, 'Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId, queryByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Initially present
      expect(getByTestId('unmount-content')).toBeDefined()

      // Toggle to not present
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()

      // Content should be removed from DOM
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(queryByTestId('unmount-content')).toBeNull()
      }, { timeout: 2000 })
    })

    it('re-mounts content when present becomes true again', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(false)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = !present.value },
            }, 'Toggle'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value, unmountOnExit: true, lazyMount: true }, {
              default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'remount-content' }, 'Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId, queryByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Initially not present (lazy mount)
      expect(queryByTestId('remount-content')).toBeNull()

      // Toggle to present
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(getByTestId('remount-content')).toBeDefined()
      })

      // Toggle to not present
      await toggle.click()

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(queryByTestId('remount-content')).toBeNull()
      }, { timeout: 2000 })

      // Toggle to present again
      await toggle.click()

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(getByTestId('remount-content')).toBeDefined()
      })
    })
  })

  describe('lazyMount and unmountOnExit combined', () => {
    it('lazy mounts and unmounts correctly', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(false)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = !present.value },
            }, 'Toggle'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value, lazyMount: true, unmountOnExit: true }, {
              default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'combined-content' }, 'Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId, queryByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Initially not rendered (lazy)
      expect(queryByTestId('combined-content')).toBeNull()

      // Toggle to present
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(getByTestId('combined-content')).toBeDefined()
      })

      // Toggle to not present
      await toggle.click()

      // Should be unmounted
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(queryByTestId('combined-content')).toBeNull()
      }, { timeout: 2000 })
    })
  })

  describe('events', () => {
    it('emits exitComplete when exit animation completes', async () => {
      const onExitComplete = vi.fn()

      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(true)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = false },
            }, 'Hide'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value, onExitComplete }, {
              default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'exit-content' }, 'Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Toggle to not present
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()

      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(onExitComplete).toHaveBeenCalled()
      }, { timeout: 2000 })
    })
  })

  describe('data attributes', () => {
    it('sets data-state to open when present is true', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'content' }, 'Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = screen.getByTestId('content')
        const parent = content.parentElement
        expect(parent?.getAttribute('data-state')).toBe('open')
      })
    })

    it('sets data-state to closed when present is false', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: false }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'content' }, 'Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = screen.getByTestId('content')
        const parent = content.parentElement
        expect(parent?.getAttribute('data-state')).toBe('closed')
      })
    })

    it('has data-scope and data-part attributes', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'content' }, 'Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = screen.getByTestId('content')
        const parent = content.parentElement
        expect(parent?.getAttribute('data-scope')).toBe('presence')
        expect(parent?.getAttribute('data-part')).toBe('root')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('immediate prop', () => {
    it('respects immediate prop for state synchronization', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true, immediate: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'immediate-content' }, 'Immediate Content'),
          })
        },
      })

      // Should render immediately
      expect(screen.getByTestId('immediate-content')).toBeDefined()
    })
  })

  describe('slot content', () => {
    it('renders slot content correctly', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true }, {
            default: () => [
              h('h1', null, 'Title'),
              h('p', null, 'Paragraph'),
              h('button', null, 'Button'),
            ],
          })
        },
      })

      expect(screen.getByText('Title')).toBeDefined()
      expect(screen.getByText('Paragraph')).toBeDefined()
      expect(screen.getByText('Button')).toBeDefined()
    })

    it('renders complex nested content', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'outer' }, [
              h('div', { 'data-testid': 'inner' }, [
                h('span', { 'data-testid': 'deep' }, 'Deep Content'),
              ]),
            ]),
          })
        },
      })

      expect(screen.getByTestId('outer')).toBeDefined()
      expect(screen.getByTestId('inner')).toBeDefined()
      expect(screen.getByTestId('deep')).toBeDefined()
      expect(screen.getByText('Deep Content')).toBeDefined()
    })
  })

  describe('context', () => {
    it('provides presence context to children', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Presence, { present: true }, {
            default: () => h('div', { 'data-testid': 'context-child' }, 'With Context'),
          })
        },
      })

      // Should render without errors, indicating context is properly provided
      expect(screen.getByTestId('context-child')).toBeDefined()
    })
  })

  describe('animation support', () => {
    it('supports CSS animations via data-state attribute', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const present = ref(true)

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle',
              'onClick': () => { present.value = !present.value },
            }, 'Toggle'),
            h(Presence, { present: present.value }, {
              default: () => h('div', {
                'data-testid': 'animated-content',
                'class': 'animated',
              }, 'Animated Content'),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      const { getByTestId } = render(TestComponent)

      // Initially open
      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = getByTestId('animated-content')
        const parent = content.parentElement
        expect(parent?.getAttribute('data-state')).toBe('open')
      })

      // Toggle to closed
      const toggle = getByTestId('toggle')
      await toggle.click()

      await waitFor(() => {
        const content = getByTestId('animated-content')
        const parent = content.parentElement
        expect(parent?.getAttribute('data-state')).toBe('closed')
      })
    })
  })
})
```

```
import { cleanup, fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapse } from '../index'

describe('collapse', () => {
  const items = ['React', 'Solid', 'Vue']

  afterEach(() => {
    cleanup()
  })

  describe('basic functionality', () => {
    it('renders correctly with default props', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should be rendered
      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      expect(buttons.length).toBe(items.length)
    })

    it('all items are collapsed by default', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should have aria-expanded="false"
      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      for (const button of buttons) {
        expect(button.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      }
    })

    it('expands item when trigger is clicked', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      const reactTrigger = buttons[0]

      // Click to expand
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('defaultValue prop', () => {
    it('expands items specified in defaultValue', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['Vue'] }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
        // Vue is the third item
        expect(buttons[2].getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
        expect(buttons[0].getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
```

```
import { fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapse } from '../index'

describe('collapse', () => {
  const items = ['React', 'Solid', 'Vue']

  describe('basic functionality', () => {
    it('renders correctly with default props', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should be rendered
      for (const item of items) {
        expect(screen.getByText(`${item} trigger`)).toBeDefined()
      }
    })

    it('all items are collapsed by default', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should have aria-expanded="false"
      for (const item of items) {
        const trigger = screen.getByText(`${item} trigger`)
        expect(trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      }
    })

    it('expands item when trigger is clicked', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')

      // Click to expand
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('defaultValue prop', () => {
    it('expands items specified in defaultValue', async () => {
      render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['Vue'] }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const vueTrigger = screen.getByText('Vue trigger')
        expect(vueTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')

        const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
```

```
import { cleanup, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapse } from '../index'

// 用于浏览器模式的点击辅助函数
async function click(element: Element) {
  element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
}

// 用于浏览器模式的键盘事件辅助函数
async function keyDown(element: Element, key: string) {
  element.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key, bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
}

// 用于浏览器模式的焦点事件辅助函数
async function focus(element: Element) {
  ;(element as HTMLElement).focus()
  element.dispatchEvent(new FocusEvent('focus', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
}

describe('collapse', () => {
  const items = ['React', 'Solid', 'Vue']

  afterEach(() => {
    cleanup()
  })

  describe('basic functionality', () => {
    it('renders correctly with default props', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should be rendered
      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      expect(buttons.length).toBe(items.length)
    })

    it('all items are collapsed by default', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should have aria-expanded="false"
      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      for (const button of buttons) {
        expect(button.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      }
    })

    it('expands item when trigger is clicked', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      const reactTrigger = buttons[0]

      // Click to expand
      await click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('defaultValue prop', () => {
    it('expands items specified in defaultValue', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['Vue'] }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
        // Vue is the third item
        expect(buttons[2].getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
        expect(buttons[0].getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('controlled modelValue prop', () => {
    it('respects controlled state via v-model', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const value = ref(['React'])

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle-solid',
              'onClick': () => {
                if (value.value.includes('Solid')) {
                  value.value = value.value.filter(v => v !== 'Solid')
                }
                else {
                  value.value = [...value.value, 'Solid']
                }
              },
            }, 'Toggle Solid'),
            h(Collapse.Root, { modelValue: value.value }, {
              default: () => items.map(item =>
                h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                  default: () => [
                    h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                    h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                  ],
                }),
              ),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      render(TestComponent)

      await waitFor(() => {
        const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })

      // Toggle Solid via external button
      await click(screen.getByTestId('toggle-solid'))
```

```
import { cleanup, fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapse } from '../index'

describe('collapse', () => {
  const items = ['React', 'Solid', 'Vue']

  afterEach(() => {
    cleanup()
  })

  describe('basic functionality', () => {
    it('renders correctly with default props', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should be rendered
      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      expect(buttons.length).toBe(items.length)
    })

    it('all items are collapsed by default', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      // All triggers should have aria-expanded="false"
      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      for (const button of buttons) {
        expect(button.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      }
    })

    it('expands item when trigger is clicked', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, null, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
      const reactTrigger = buttons[0]

      // Click to expand
      await fireEvent.click(reactTrigger)
      await waitFor(() => {
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('defaultValue prop', () => {
    it('expands items specified in defaultValue', async () => {
      const { getAllByRole } = render({
        setup() {
          return () => h(Collapse.Root, { defaultValue: ['Vue'] }, {
            default: () => items.map(item =>
              h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                default: () => [
                  h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                  h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                ],
              }),
            ),
          })
        },
      })

      await waitFor(() => {
        const buttons = getAllByRole('button')
        // Vue is the third item
        expect(buttons[2].getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
        expect(buttons[0].getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('false')
      })
    })
  })

  describe('controlled modelValue prop', () => {
    it('respects controlled state via v-model', async () => {
      const TestComponent = {
        setup() {
          const value = ref(['React'])

          return () => h('div', [
            h('button', {
              'data-testid': 'toggle-solid',
              'onClick': () => {
                if (value.value.includes('Solid')) {
                  value.value = value.value.filter(v => v !== 'Solid')
                }
                else {
                  value.value = [...value.value, 'Solid']
                }
              },
            }, 'Toggle Solid'),
            h(Collapse.Root, { modelValue: value.value }, {
              default: () => items.map(item =>
                h(Collapse.Item, { key: item, value: item }, {
                  default: () => [
                    h(Collapse.ItemTrigger, null, { default: () => `${item} trigger` }),
                    h(Collapse.ItemContent, null, { default: () => `${item} content` }),
                  ],
                }),
              ),
            }),
          ])
        },
      }

      render(TestComponent)

      await waitFor(() => {
        const reactTrigger = screen.getByText('React trigger')
        expect(reactTrigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded')).toBe('true')
      })

      // Toggle Solid via external button
      await fireEvent.click(screen.getByTestId('toggle-solid'))
```

```
import { cleanup, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapse } from '../index'

// 用于浏览器模式的点击辅助函数
async function click(element: Element) {
  // 先聚焦元素，然后模拟完整的点击序列
  if (element instanceof HTMLElement) {
    element.focus()
  }
  element.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent('pointerdown', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  element.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent('pointerup', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
  // 给状态机一些时间来处理事件
  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50))
}

// 用于浏览器模式的键盘事件辅助函数
async function keyDown(element: Element, key: string) {
  element.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key, bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 50))
}

// 用于浏览器模式的焦点事件辅助函数
async function focus(element: Element) {
  if (element instanceof HTMLElement) {
    element.focus()
  }
  element.dispatchEvent(new FocusEvent('focus', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
}
```

```
import { cleanup, render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/vue'
import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { h, nextTick, ref } from 'vue'
import { Collapse } from '../index'

// 用于浏览器模式的点击辅助函数
async function click(element: Element) {
  element.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
}

// 用于浏览器模式的键盘事件辅助函数
async function keyDown(element: Element, key: string) {
  element.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', { key, bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
}

// 用于浏览器模式的焦点事件辅助函数
async function focus(element: Element) {
  ;(element as HTMLElement).focus()
  element.dispatchEvent(new FocusEvent('focus', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))
  await nextTick()
}
```
